---
title: "Engagement Radar"
subtitle: "Is the world responding? Updated daily by automation."
toc: false
---

> Snapshot 2026-07-07. Repo traffic covers the GitHub repository (14-day window). Site-wide analytics unlock automatically once research.schadler.tech goes live behind Cloudflare.

**Stars:** 0 · **Forks:** 0 · **Watchers:** 0 · **Repo visits (14d):** 32 (1 uniques) · **Clones (14d):** 215

**Consultation:** 1 votes · 1 comments across 20 ballots — [live board](consultation.qmd)

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple"}
**Movement since last snapshot:** +1 uniques14 · +1 votes · +1 comments
:::

## Where visitors come from

| Referrer | Visits | Uniques |
|---|---|---|
| Google | 8 | 1 |

## Most-viewed repo pages

| Path | Views |
|---|---|
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp | 13 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/compare/feature/simulator-compare | 2 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/issues | 2 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/issues/33 | 2 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/blob/main/api/.gitkeep | 1 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/blob/main/api/README.md | 1 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/commit/0f92ad198a1925c8ec30026a5b2e464d7844e080 | 1 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/commit/aedf37602fb8ff6309a45fc3cf608ef04eee154d | 1 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/compare/feature/press-briefs | 1 |
| /lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp/compare/feature/tri-vote-20q | 1 |
